steps.title: Identify what the student needs
steps.content: The student must provide both an explanation of what Aeolian landforms are AND a specific example.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice explains Aeolian landforms as “landforms created by the wind” and provides the specific example of a mushroom rock, describing how wind erodes the base faster than the top—exactly matching the notes.

The other choices either offer vague descriptions instead of a concrete example (A), mischaracterize erosion/transportation/deposition as landform examples (C), or describe only a single example without explaining Aeolian landforms broadly (D).

This matches the correct answer — B is correct.
